description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular chest of drawers constructed from a warm, reddish-brown wood with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The front features three wide, evenly spaced drawers with recessed handle grooves, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, showcasing the wood's texture and color. The base is slightly inset, creating a subtle shadow and elevating the piece just above the ground. There are no visible locks, decorative carvings, or branding on any surface. The overall design is functional and understated, suitable for both residential and utilitarian urban environments.
description: A modern, wooden chest of drawers with three wide drawers and recessed handles, finished in a warm reddish-brown wood grain. The design is minimalist and unadorned, emphasizing function and simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wide drawers with recessed handle grooves and a flat top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a flat, unadorned wood surface and the drawer edges.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous, featureless wood panel and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the flat wood surface and drawer edges.
